metricHint: Left: WAU — unique subscribers with app server contact in the last 7 days (device last_seen), Firebase-like. Right bar — same rule over the selected series depth in days (30 vs 60 now changes the count; previously it was always a fixed 30-day window unrelated to the dropdown). The line chart is daily uniques from plog over the selected depth (a trend; daily values do not sum to WAU). On a small cohort WAU is often close to the long window: most monthly actives also show up in the last week.
noData: No data (check ClickHouse and API rights)
housesNoAddressApi: No access to address directory — house selection disabled
eventsChartsHint: Charts are built from the latest events in the log. Optionally narrow by flat or phone.
noDauSeries: No app-open events in the window (or no series points in ClickHouse).
eventsListHint: Pick a house in the summary block — events for all flats in that building are listed below. Enter a phone and click “Load events” to narrow the feed; “All house events” clears the phone filter.
pickHouseForEvents: Select a specific house to load the event feed (not “all houses”).
